summary: ThreeDScene: Riemann sphere with BLUE surface + GREY meridians + 3 colored parallels (RED south, YELLOW equator, GREEN north). ValueTracker theta_tr rotates sphere about x-axis through 2π via always_redraw replacement of sphere_group with rotated copy. Corresponds to Möbius map z↦1/z̄ flipping 0 ↔ ∞.
